== Notes for [[Item:Q115667|Q115667]] ==

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elvira_of_Toro

Doña Elvira (1038/9 - 15 November 1101) was a Leonese infanta and the Lady of Toro. She was a daughter of Ferdinand I of León and wife Sancha. She made an important donation of lands to the monastery of San Salvador de Oña in the year 1087. She received the city of Toro on the death of her father, while her sister Urraca received Zamora, and her brothers Sancho II, Alfonso VI and García received the kingdoms of Castile, León, and Galicia respectively.


Sources
Reilly, Bernard F. 1988. The Kingdom of León-Castilla under King Alfonso VI, 1065-1109. Princeton: Princeton University Press.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
